seoTitle: Theresa Creek vs Theresa Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Theresa Creek and Theresa Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Theresa Creek vs Theresa Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Theresa Creek and Theresa Park.
heading: Theresa Creek vs Theresa Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Theresa Creek, New South Wales and Theresa Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Theresa Park has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Theresa Creek (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Theresa Creek or Theresa Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Theresa Creek has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Theresa Park scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Theresa Creek scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Theresa Park scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Theresa Creek or Theresa Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Theresa Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
